scenarios.title: Vague feature direction needs a brief
scenarios.prompt: We need something better for team onboarding. I do not know if it is docs, automation, or AI. Help me pin it down.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Starts proposing solutions immediately and mixes product ideas with execution steps without first narrowing the user and problem.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Clarifies the target user, current workaround, sharpest pain, and smallest useful wedge, then returns a brief with success criteria and recommended next step.

scenarios.title: Broad request gets narrowed before planning
scenarios.prompt: I want a whole planning system for feature requests, product reviews, and launch readiness. Where do we even start?
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Treats the request as one giant implementation problem and produces a bloated solution space.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Reduces the request to a tractable first wedge, states non-goals, and outputs a scoped brief that can be reviewed next.

scenarios.title: Default mode framing routing
scenarios.prompt: Use jy-framing on this messy feature idea. I have not switched modes yet.
scenarios.expected_without_skill: Acts like interactive planning can happen without acknowledging the collaboration mode constraint.
scenarios.expected_with_skill: Explains that this is a Plan Mode task, tells the user to press Shift+Tab, and still leaves a compact brief draft so the turn is useful.
